{{Extend "layout"}} {{Block "title"}}{{$.Stored.title}} - {{"服务管理"|$.T}} - {{"Swarm管理"|$.T}}{{/Block}} {{Block "breadcrumb"}} {{Super}}
  • {{"Swarm管理"|$.T}}
  • {{"服务管理"|$.T}}
  • {{$.Stored.title}}
    • {{/Block}} {{Block "main"}}

    {{$.Stored.title}}

    {{`一行一个由等号“=”分隔的键值对。例如：`|$.T}}xxx.builder=nging
    {{$v := $.Form `mode`}}
    {{$v := $.Form "mode[global][_]"}}
    {{"最大并发"|$.T}} {{"执行次数"|$.T}}
    {{$v := $.Form "mode[globalJob][_]"}}
    {{"更新时的并行数量"|$.T}}
    {{`由数字和单个字母的单位组成。支持的单位有："ms", "s", "m", "h"，分别代表 "毫秒", "秒", "分钟", "小时"`|$.T}}
    {{$v := $.Form `updateConfig[failureAction]`}}
    {{"更新失败时要进行的操作。"|$.T}}
    {{`由数字和单个字母的单位组成。支持的单位有："ms", "s", "m", "h"，分别代表 "毫秒", "秒", "分钟", "小时"`|$.T}}
    {{"更新时的最大失败率"|$.T}}
    {{$v := $.Form `updateConfig[order]`}}
    {{`执行更新任务时的操作顺序。`|$.T}}
    {{"回滚时的并行数量"|$.T}}
    {{`由数字和单个字母的单位组成。支持的单位有："ms", "s", "m", "h"，分别代表 "毫秒", "秒", "分钟", "小时"`|$.T}}
    {{$v := $.Form `rollbackConfig[failureAction]`}}
    {{"回滚失败时要进行的操作。"|$.T}}
    {{`由数字和单个字母的单位组成。支持的单位有："ms", "s", "m", "h"，分别代表 "毫秒", "秒", "分钟", "小时"`|$.T}}
    {{"回滚时的最大失败率"|$.T}}
    {{$v := $.Form `rollbackConfig[order]`}}
    {{`执行回滚任务时的操作顺序。`|$.T}}
    {{$v := $.Form "endpointSpec[mode]"}}
    {{$names := $.FormValues "endpointSpec[ports][name]"}} {{$nameLen := len $names}} {{$protocols := $.FormValues "endpointSpec[ports][protocol]"}} {{$protocolLen := len $protocols}} {{$targetPorts := $.FormValues "endpointSpec[ports][targetPort]"}} {{$targetPortLen := len $targetPorts}} {{$publishedPorts := $.FormValues "endpointSpec[ports][publishedPort]"}} {{$publishedPortLen := len $publishedPorts}} {{range $k,$v:=$.FormValues "endpointSpec[ports][publishMode]"}} {{if and (lt $k $nameLen) (lt $k $protocolLen) (lt $k $targetPortLen) (lt $k $publishedPortLen)}} {{end}} {{end}}
    {{"名称"|$.T}} {{"网络协议"|$.T}} {{"容器端口"|$.T}} {{"发布端口"|$.T}} {{"发布模式"|$.T}} {{"删除"|$.T}}
    {{$proto := index $protocols $k}}
    {{$storageVolumeMount := $.Form `storageVolumeMount` `N`}}
    {{$types := $.FormValues "taskTemplate[containerSpec][mounts][type]"}} {{$typeLen := len $types}} {{$sources := $.FormValues "taskTemplate[containerSpec][mounts][source]"}} {{$sourceLen := len $sources}} {{$readOnlyList := $.FormValues "taskTemplate[containerSpec][mounts][readOnly]"}} {{$readOnlyLen := len $readOnlyList}} {{$consistencyList := $.FormValues "taskTemplate[containerSpec][mounts][consistency]"}} {{$consistencyLen := len $consistencyList}} {{$propagations := $.FormValues "taskTemplate[containerSpec][mounts][bindOptions][propagation]"}} {{$propagationLen := len $propagations}} {{$nonRecursives := $.FormValues "taskTemplate[containerSpec][mounts][bindOptions][nonRecursive]"}} {{$nonRecursiveLen := len $nonRecursives}} {{range $k,$v:=$.FormValues "taskTemplate[containerSpec][mounts][target]"}} {{if and (lt $k $typeLen) (lt $k $sourceLen) (lt $k $readOnlyLen) (lt $k $consistencyLen) (lt $k $propagationLen) (lt $k $nonRecursiveLen)}} {{end}} {{end}}
    {{"类型"|$.T}} {{"容器路径"|$.T}} {{"宿主机路径"|$.T}} {{"读写权限"|$.T}} {{"相容性"|$.T}} {{"传播"|$.T}} {{"删除"|$.T}}
    {{$type := index $types $k}} {{$readOnly := index $readOnlyList $k}} {{$consistency := index $consistencyList $k}} {{$propagation := index $propagations $k}} {{$nonRecursive := index $nonRecursives $k}}
    {{$v := $.Form `taskTemplate[runtime]`}}
    {{$commandEnabled := $.Form "commandEnabled" "N"}}
    {{`启动命令时的工作目录`|$.T}}
    {{`一行一个由等号“=”分隔的键值对。例如：`|$.T}}NAME=VALUE
    {{`一行一个由等号“=”分隔的键值对。例如：`|$.T}}xxx.builder=nging
    {{$v := $.Form `taskTemplate[restartPolicy][condition]`}}
    {{`指定重启服务的条件`|$.T}}
    {{`限制重启重试次数。0 表示不限制`|$.T}}
    {{`限制重启重试次数。0 表示不限制`|$.T}}
    {{`需带单位 "us", "ms", "s", "m", "h"，分别表示 "微秒", "毫秒", "秒", "分钟", "小时"`|$.T}}
    {{/Block}} {{Block "footer"}} {{/Block}}
